title: Eye Crushing Additions
description: Eye Crushing compatibility with End Remastered Additions
body:
This is a compatibility datapack for [Eye Crushing](https://modrinth.com/datapack/eyecrushing) and [End Remastered Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-remastered-additions).

It adds [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) crushing recipes for the [End Remastered Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-remastered-additions) eyes the same way [Eye Crushing](https://modrinth.com/datapack/eyecrushing) does.

## Dependencies
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [End Remastered Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-remastered-additions) (with [End Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem) as its dependency)
- Athough technically not required, [Eye Crushing](https://modrinth.com/datapack/eyecrushing) is recommended to use with this datapack as it only adds the recipes for [End Remastered Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-remastered-additions)
